_instructions: Use these curl commands to test the webhook. Replace localhost:5678 with your n8n URL if hosted remotely.

test_hot_lead.description: Budapest hotel chain needing full digital presence. Should score HOT.
test_hot_lead.curl: curl -X POST http://localhost:5678/webhook/bridgeworks-lead -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"name": "Viktor Szabo", "email": "viktor@grandhotelbudapest.hu", "company": "Grand Hotel Budapest", "source": "form", "message": "We are a 4-star hotel in Budapest with 120 rooms. We need a complete digital overhaul: new website, Google Business optimization, LinkedIn presence, and ongoing social media management. We want to start within 2 weeks. Budget is flexible for quality work. Can we schedule a call this week?"}'

payload.name: Viktor Szabo
payload.message: We are a 4-star hotel in Budapest with 120 rooms. We need a complete digital overhaul: new website, Google Business optimization, LinkedIn presence, and ongoing social media management. We want to start within 2 weeks. Budget is flexible for quality work. Can we schedule a call this week?

test_warm_lead.description: Nigerian small business exploring options. Should score WARM.
test_warm_lead.curl: curl -X POST http://localhost:5678/webhook/bridgeworks-lead -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"name": "Adaeze Okafor", "email": "adaeze@okaforinteriors.ng", "company": "Okafor Interiors", "source": "whatsapp", "message": "Hi, I saw your work on LinkedIn. I run an interior design firm in Lagos. We have an Instagram page but no website yet. I have been thinking about getting more professional online. What do you offer and what does it cost?"}'

payload.name: Adaeze Okafor
payload.message: Hi, I saw your work on LinkedIn. I run an interior design firm in Lagos. We have an Instagram page but no website yet. I have been thinking about getting more professional online. What do you offer and what does it cost?

test_cold_lead.description: Vague request, no company, no budget signals. Should score COLD.
test_cold_lead.curl: curl -X POST http://localhost:5678/webhook/bridgeworks-lead -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"name": "Random Person", "email": "random123@gmail.com", "company": "", "source": "form", "message": "hi can you help me make money online? i want to start something but i dont know what. do you do free consultations?"}'

payload.name: Random Person
payload.message: hi can you help me make money online? i want to start something but i dont know what. do you do free consultations?

test_linkedin_lead.description: CEE startup from LinkedIn message. Should score HOT or WARM.
test_linkedin_lead.curl: curl -X POST http://localhost:5678/webhook/bridgeworks-lead -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"name": "Marta Kovacs", "email": "marta@techhub.cz", "company": "TechHub Prague", "source": "linkedin", "message": "Emmanuel, I run a coworking space in Prague with 200 members. We need brand identity work and a new website. I saw your case study with CEEFM and your approach to AI-powered delivery is exactly what we need. Our budget is around 3000-5000 EUR. Can we talk next week?"}'

payload.name: Marta Kovacs
payload.message: Emmanuel, I run a coworking space in Prague with 200 members. We need brand identity work and a new website. I saw your case study with CEEFM and your approach to AI-powered delivery is exactly what we need. Our budget is around 3000-5000 EUR. Can we talk next week?

test_cold_email_reply.description: Reply to a cold outreach sequence. Should score WARM or HOT.
test_cold_email_reply.curl: curl -X POST http://localhost:5678/webhook/bridgeworks-lead -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"name": "Ibrahim Yusuf", "email": "ibrahim@yusuflegal.com", "company": "Yusuf Legal Associates", "source": "cold-email", "message": "Thanks for reaching out Emmanuel. Your email caught my attention. We are a law firm in Abuja and honestly our online presence is embarrassing for a firm our size. We would be interested in understanding what a full digital setup would look like for us. Can you send a proposal?"}'

payload.name: Ibrahim Yusuf
payload.message: Thanks for reaching out Emmanuel. Your email caught my attention. We are a law firm in Abuja and honestly our online presence is embarrassing for a firm our size. We would be interested in understanding what a full digital setup would look like for us. Can you send a proposal?
